columns.name: season
columns.comment: Represents the NFL season for which the team data is relevant, typically denoted by the year.

columns.name: team
columns.comment: Identifies the name of the team in the NFL.

columns.name: nfl
columns.comment: Refers to the official NFL designation for the team.

columns.name: nfl_team_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier assigned to each team within the NFL for reference purposes.

columns.name: espn
columns.comment: Indicates the team's name as recognized by ESPN.

columns.name: pfr
columns.comment: Represents the team's name as recorded on Pro Football Reference.

columns.name: pff
columns.comment: Represents the team's performance grade according to Pro Football Focus metrics.

columns.name: pfflabel
columns.comment: Describes the label associated with the team in Pro Football Focus analytics.

columns.name: fo
columns.comment: Indicates the team's name in Football Outsiders' metrics and analysis.

columns.name: full
columns.comment: Contains the full name of the team including any prefixes or suffixes.

columns.name: location
columns.comment: Specifies the geographical location or city associated with the team.

columns.name: short_location
columns.comment: Provides a shortened version of the team's location or city name.

columns.name: nickname
columns.comment: Represents the commonly used nickname of the team.

columns.name: hyphenated
columns.comment: Shows the hyphenated version of the team name, if applicable.

columns.name: sbr
columns.comment: Contains a unique identifier used by Sports Betting Ratings for the team.

columns.name: sbr_wins
columns.comment: Indicates the number of wins attributed to the team as recorded by Sports Betting Ratings.

columns.name: sbr_name
columns.comment: Specifies the name used for the team in Sports Betting Ratings.

columns.name: draft_kings
columns.comment: Indicates the team's designation as recognized by DraftKings.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: Records the timestamp when the team data was ingested into the database.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: Identifies the source file from which the team data was originally extracted.
